generated_oml:
instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool, CPlusPlusCodeGenerator, JavaCodeGenerator
]

instance ACMEModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component and connector architecture description using ACME"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture description using AADL for embedded systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture description using MontiArc for component-based systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagrams for component interconnections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling using MontiArc Automaton"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling using SysML v1.7 state machines"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkTool
]

instance SimulinkTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation tool for dynamic system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CPlusPlusCodeGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ code generation from architectural models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CPlusPlusCodeGenerationService
]

instance JavaCodeGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java code generation from architectural models"
    DTDFVocab:enables JavaCodeGenerationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performs dynamic simulation of system behavior using MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultsInsight
]

instance CPlusPlusCodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates executable C++ code from system models"
    DTDFVocab:provides GeneratedCPlusPlusCodeInsight
]

instance JavaCodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates executable Java code from system models"
    DTDFVocab:provides GeneratedJavaCodeInsight
]

instance SimulationResultsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for system behavior analysis"
]

instance GeneratedCPlusPlusCodeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated C++ code for system implementation"
]

instance GeneratedJavaCodeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated Java code for system implementation"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML [17], ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25], [26], and methodologies such as RFLP [18], [19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], and SMArDT [22] for structured system modeling, component & connector architecture, and behavior specification, ensuring interoperability among heterogeneous stakeholders."
]
